HOMEABOUT COMPANYSERVICESNEWSCONTACT US

SERVICES

CONSTRUCTION AND CONTRACTING

Turnkey support for public and private construction projects, infrastructure, superstructure, restoration, landscaping and technical consultancy.

HARDWARE AND INDUSTRIAL EQUIPMENT

Supply, marketing, import and export of hardware, connection elements, cutting tools, measuring equipment and heavy industrial machinery.

ELECTRICAL AND ELECTRONICS

Procurement, trade and integration of electrical systems, technological equipment, automation and technical infrastructure.

TRANSPORTATION AND LOGISTICS

Professional coordination of shipping organizations for products, equipment and commercial goods with a focus on timely delivery.

INDUSTRIAL RAW MATERIALS

Reliable sourcing of industrial raw materials and semi-finished products from domestic and international markets.

MACHINES AND EQUIPMENT

Wholesale supply of machinery, equipment and related parts needed by industrial and construction projects.

CONVEYOR BELTS

Reliable conveyor belt solutions and components for industrial systems and equipment continuity.

BEARINGS

Durable bearings and mechanical components for machinery, production lines and industrial maintenance.

TECHNICAL CERAMICS

Glass and ceramic products for technical use, selected for quality, durability and sector-specific requirements.

ABRASIVES AND SANDPAPER

Sanding, abrasion and finishing products for industrial, construction and equipment-related applications.

НАЗВАНИЕ КОМПАНИИ LLC

Construction, industrial equipment, materials and logistics supply company
